flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Nebraska-Lincoln fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Nebraska-Lincoln are 17% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($56.9k vs $48.6k).
